description_long: This hamburger features a soft, round plain white bun with a light dusting of flour on top. The top bun is slightly domed and sits atop a thick beef patty, which is visible along the edges. Fresh toppings, including slices of tomato, lettuce, onions, and possibly pickles, are layered above the patty, with some crispy fried onions or similar garnish adding texture. The hamburger is served on a piece of white wax paper, which is placed inside a shallow, disposable paper tray. Some sauce or juices have seeped onto the paper, indicating a juicy and flavorful interior. The overall appearance is appetizing and typical of a classic fast-food hamburger.
description: A classic hamburger with a plain white bun, beef patty, and fresh toppings, served on wax paper in a paper tray. The sandwich looks juicy and well-layered with visible vegetables and sauce.
description_view_0: Front view showing the hamburger's top bun, visible tomato, lettuce, and onions peeking out, with the sandwich resting in a paper tray.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the plain back of the bun and the edge of the patty, with minimal toppings visible.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the patty, lettuce, and some sauce, with the bun slightly lifted to reveal the interior layers.
description_view_3: Angled view focusing on the exposed tomato, onions, and lettuce, with the patty and bun clearly visible.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Toppings such as tomato, lettuce, onions, and possibly pickles are layered above the patty, with some distributed unevenly and visible from the sides and front. The arrangement appears casual, with some toppings protruding from the bun.
